title: Sentry MCP Server Environment Configuration
description: Environment variables supported by the Sentry MCP server container.

SENTRY_ACCESS_TOKEN.title: Sentry Access Token
SENTRY_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Sentry User Auth Token with API access. Required for self-hosted instances and recommended for non-interactive container use.

SENTRY_CLIENT_ID.title: OAuth Client ID
SENTRY_CLIENT_ID.description: Override the OAuth client ID used for the sentry.io device-code authentication flow.

SENTRY_URL.title: Sentry Instance URL
SENTRY_URL.description: Full HTTPS URL for a self-hosted Sentry instance, for example https://sentry.example.com. Mutually exclusive with SENTRY_HOST.

SENTRY_HOST.title: Sentry Instance Hostname
SENTRY_HOST.description: Hostname, and optional port, for a self-hosted Sentry instance, for example sentry.example.com or sentry.internal:9000. Do not include a URL scheme. Mutually exclusive with SENTRY_URL.

MCP_URL.title: MCP Server Public URL
MCP_URL.description: Public URL for the MCP server when a client or proxy needs to know the externally reachable endpoint.

SENTRY_DSN.title: Telemetry DSN
SENTRY_DSN.description: DSN used by the MCP server for its own telemetry reporting. Overrides DEFAULT_SENTRY_DSN when both are set.

DEFAULT_SENTRY_DSN.title: Default Telemetry DSN
DEFAULT_SENTRY_DSN.description: Fallback DSN used by the MCP server for its own telemetry reporting when SENTRY_DSN is unset.

OPENAI_API_KEY.title: OpenAI API Key
OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI or Azure OpenAI API key for embedded-agent and AI-powered search features.

OPENAI_API_VERSION.title: Azure OpenAI API Version
OPENAI_API_VERSION.description: Azure OpenAI API version used when EMBEDDED_AGENT_PROVIDER is azure-openai.

OPENAI_MODEL.title: OpenAI Model
OPENAI_MODEL.description: OpenAI or Azure OpenAI model for embedded-agent features.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.title: Anthropic API Key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for embedded-agent and AI-powered search features.

EMBEDDED_AGENT_PROVIDER.title: Embedded Agent Provider
EMBEDDED_AGENT_PROVIDER.description: LLM provider override for embedded-agent features. If unset, the server auto-detects from available API keys.

MCP_SKILLS.title: Enabled Skills
MCP_SKILLS.description: Comma-separated list of skills to grant. If unset, all skills are enabled.

MCP_DISABLE_SKILLS.title: Disabled Skills
MCP_DISABLE_SKILLS.description: Comma-separated list of skills to disable, for example seer.

SENTRY_MCP_AUTH_CACHE.title: Authentication Cache File
SENTRY_MCP_AUTH_CACHE.description: Path to the OAuth token cache file used by interactive authentication flows.

LOG_LEVEL.title: Log Level
LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level emitted by the server.

NODE_ENV.title: Runtime Environment
NODE_ENV.description: Node.js runtime environment. The container defaults to production.

SENTRY_URL.errorMessage: SENTRY_URL and SENTRY_HOST are mutually exclusive.

SENTRY_HOST.errorMessage: SENTRY_HOST and SENTRY_URL are mutually exclusive.
